faq.title: Everything you need
faq.subtitle: Direct answers to the questions CTOs and CEOs ask most before their first meeting with us.

items.question: How long does it take to deploy an AI agent to production?
items.answer: It depends on complexity. A standard Omnichannel agent (WhatsApp + Web Chat) takes between 2 and 4 weeks from kick-off to production, including CRM integration, RAG memory configuration, and adversarial QA testing under the Ouroboros Protocol. More complex projects with IoT integrations or Multi-Agent orchestration typically take between 6 and 12 weeks.

items.question: What differentiates Agentix Vanguard from a chatbot agency?
items.answer: Architecture. Chatbots are linear decision trees; our agents have persistent memory (RAG), multi-step reasoning, and the ability to autonomously execute actions in external systems (APIs, databases, IoT hardware). Additionally, the Ouroboros Protocol guarantees adversarial QA on every deployment, eliminating production errors.

items.question: Where is my data stored? Is it secure?
items.answer: We operate on dedicated infrastructure within your cloud of choice (GCP, AWS, Azure). All data in transit is protected with TLS 1.3 and at rest with AES-256. We work under VPC isolated architecture with zero-trust network segmentation. We are SOC 2 Ready, meaning our practices meet the most demanding enterprise security standards.

items.question: Does it work in Spanish and English?
items.answer: Yes. Our agents are natively multilingual. We use top-tier LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) with native understanding of 90+ languages. We also configure the agent's persona, tone, and vocabulary per language to guarantee brand consistency in each market.

items.question: How much does it cost to implement an Agentix Vanguard agent?
items.answer: Projects start with a free Architecture Audit where we assess your specific use case. From there, engagements range from modular implementations (a single channel or function) to full agentic platforms. Costs vary based on complexity, integrations, and interaction volume. Schedule your audit to get a tailored estimate for your business.

items.question: Can I use my own models, or does it have to be a third-party LLM?
items.answer: Completely flexible. We can deploy on foundation models from Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google, or integrate custom fine-tuned models deployed on Vertex AI, Amazon SageMaker, or Azure AI. The Ouroboros Protocol is model-agnostic by design, giving us resilience: if a provider raises prices or experiences downtime, the system automatically switches.

aiTech.title: AI Technologies
aiTech.subtitle: We don't rely on a single black box. We architect on top of the world's most advanced LLMs and Frameworks to ensure true enterprise resilience.

items.name: Anthropic Claude
items.description: Anthropic is pioneering safe, reliable AI prioritizing human values. Claude empowers enterprises to deploy conversational AI responsibly, balancing cutting-edge performance with rigorous safety guardrails at scale across business workflows.

items.name: OpenAI (GPT-4o)
items.description: Revolutionizing AI with advanced multimodal models like GPT-4o. Their platform enables developers to integrate natural language generation seamlessly, driving agile innovation in complex automations.

items.name: Google Gemini
items.description: Gemini combines multimodal intelligence and advanced reasoning natively in GCP. It helps organizations unlock deeper insights, adaptive learning, and unified data processing to accelerate real-time decision-making.

items.name: Microsoft Copilot Studio
items.description: Embeds AI-driven assistance natively into corporate workflows and Azure infrastructure, transforming productivity with contextual suggestions, automated pipelines, and real-time analytics.

items.name: Microsoft AutoGen
items.description: Our core open-source framework for building and managing complex Multi-Agent workflows. It automates task coordination across different LLMs, creating unstoppable fully-autonomous operational 'Swarms'.

services.title: Digital Workforce with
services.subtitle: We don't build chatbots. We build autonomous agents that operate with the precision of a defense system.

items.title: Omnichannel AI Agents

items.title: AI Voice Agents & Telephony
items.subtitle: Your Autonomous Call Center
items.description: Deploy voice agents that handle customer phone inquiries, provide real-time troubleshooting, and seamlessly transfer to human operators when the situation requires it.

items.title: AI-Driven Marketing Automation

items.description: Develop agents that perform automated marketing tasks without intervention: intelligent content creation, hyper-personalized email campaigns, and continuous lead nurturing to maximize conversions.

items.description: Build AI agents to guide new employees through immersive onboarding processes, act as a 24/7 HR Helpdesk for routine questions, and provide essential tools that enhance your team's overall productivity.

items.description: Implement AI agents that constantly monitor company activities for regulatory compliance. They detect anomalies, flag potential risks, and generate automated reports to drastically mitigate legal and operational liabilities.

items.title: Autonomous IoT & Telematics

items.description: We wire generative AI to advanced vehicle telemetry hardware (e.g. Teltonika FMC130). Intelligent remote engine shut-off, cold chain monitoring, predictive maintenance with automatic shop scheduling, and dynamic route optimization.

steps.title: Living Specification

steps.title: Adversarial QA
